form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Secret Seduction at this track over 1609m in a FMCLCDNW1 on April 1 at $64.30. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Valley Star at this track over 1609m in a FMCLCDNW1 on April 8 at $23.90. In the mix from the inside draw.
